hero.lede: One weekly view. Coach plans, athlete executes. No more chasing spreadsheets.

why.h2b: Built for the way coaches actually coach.
why.lede: Training plans live in shared docs, group chats, and seven different apps. We pulled them into one weekly view — and let everything else fall away.

stopLogging.title: Stop logging. Start training.
stopLogging.body: Activities flow back into the plan automatically — pace, distance, heart rate, all of it. Athletes never re-type a session. Coaches see what actually happened, not what someone remembered to log.

oneView.title: One weekly view. Both sides.
oneView.body: Coach drags a session in. Athlete sees it on the same row, same week, same hour. No exports, no PDFs, no "did you get my plan?".

fullControl.title: Full control. Zero chaos.
fullControl.body: Edit a single Tuesday or rebuild a whole block. Templates, favorites, copy-paste across athletes. The plan is structured — but never rigid.

builtWith.title: Built with the people using it.
builtWith.body: Every shipped feature came from a real coach or athlete request. Public roadmap. Direct line to the team. We move fast on what matters to you.

features.lede: No feature dump. Each surface earns its place — for the coach planning the week, and the athlete running it.

week.title: Weekly view
week.body: Mon–Sun, AM/PM, every athlete. Drag to move, click to edit, hover to see the actual run. The plan is the page.

sport.title: Sport-specific sessions
sport.body: Run, bike, swim, gym, mobility. Each with its own metrics — pace, watts, RPE, sets. No square-peg fields.

dual.title: Coach & athlete views
dual.body: Same data, two lenses. Coach sees the squad and the block. Athlete sees today, this week, what's next.

self.title: Self-planning mode
self.body: No coach? No problem. Build your own block, set your zones, follow it solo. Switch to coached when you find one.

templates.title: Templates & favorites
templates.body: Build a session once. Re-use it across athletes and blocks. Copy a whole Tuesday into next week — keep what worked.

privacy.title: Strict data privacy
privacy.body: Your training data is yours. EU-hosted, encrypted at rest, never sold, never used to train models. Export or delete anything, any time.

perspectives.lede: Coach builds the week from the board. Athlete opens the app and sees today's session, today's intent, today's targets. Same data, never out of sync.

drag.title: Drag-and-drop the week
drag.body: Build templates once. Apply to one athlete or twenty.

notes.title: Inline notes per session
notes.body: Coach context lands directly on the session card.

status.title: Live status
status.body: Done · skipped · modified — you see it the second they log it.

mobile.title: Mobile-first execution
mobile.body: Athlete UI is glanceable. Today first, the rest collapsed.

joinBeta.lede: Free during public beta. No card. No team-size limit. Bring your athletes — or your coach.

contactSection.lede: Tell us about your squad, your sport, what you're missing today. We read everything.
contactSection.name: Name
contactSection.msgPhCoach: I coach 14 runners. We currently use Sheets + WhatsApp.
contactSection.msgPhAth: I run 6×/week and want a coach view I can follow on phone.

fragAuto.title: Auto-import activities
fragAuto.subtitle: Imports run, ride, swim · always on
